ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Archdeacon of Treviso|Bishop of Capo d`Istria
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Jurist. Founder of the Accademy of Venetian noblemen in Padua (Accademia dei nobili veneziani). Also member of the Solleciti Academy, Filarmonici Academy, and Olimpici Academy. See his biography by Lovanio Rossi in DBI, and a more recent contribution by Gino Benzoni, in Studi Veneziani n.s LX (2010), pp. 375-389.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
